title: tritonia longiflora
intro: Tritonia longiflora, also known as the Long-flowered Tritonia or Queen of the Mountain, is a flowering plant species in the family Iridaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its rhizome, which is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Tritonia longiflora include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. Traditional herbal preparations of Tritonia longiflora include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat a range of ailments in traditional medicine.
